name: Sakura 16x22 Monoslope Roof Shed Plan - Modern Backyard Studio, Workshop, or Storage Space(PDF)
open_features: A roomy backyard structure with a modern single-pitch roofline that maximizes interior functionality while maintaining a sleek exterior profile.
Clean framing geometry and straightforward building methods make Sakura approachable for both beginner and experienced builders.
The sloped roofline enhances contemporary curb appeal while improving drainage and simplifying roof framing.
Strategically placed doors and windows provide easy access, abundant natural light, and refreshing airflow.
description_summary: Kickstart your next backyard upgrade with the Sakura Shed Plan - a spacious 16x22 modern monoslope shed designed for efficiency, style, and clean architectural simplicity. Featuring a sleek single-slope roofline, warm horizontal wood siding potential, and crisp contemporary lines, Sakura delivers a refined exterior with flexible interior possibilities. With 352 square feet of usable space, Sakura offers an ideal footprint for homeowners looking to create a backyard office, hobby workshop, cre...
